events.event: Russia launches full-scale invasion of Ukraine across northern, eastern and southern fronts
UN General Assembly votes 141–5 demanding Russia withdraw from Ukraine
Bucha massacre evidence emerges — ICC opens war crimes investigation against Russia
Finland and Sweden formally apply for NATO membership, shattering decades of neutrality
G7 and EU approve sweeping sanctions targeting Russian oil, gas and banking sectors
Speaker Pelosi visits Taiwan — China launches largest-ever PLA military exercises encircling the island
Putin announces partial mobilisation of 300,000 reservists amid mounting battlefield losses
Russia illegally annexes four Ukrainian oblasts: Donetsk, Luhansk, Zaporizhzhia and Kherson
Crimea Bridge explosion halts Russian logistics — Kremlin retaliates with mass missile strikes on Kyiv
Ukraine liberates Kherson city — largest territorial recapture of the war so far
Missile strikes Polish border territory — NATO invokes Article 4 emergency consultations
Germany and US confirm Leopard 2 and Abrams tank transfers to Ukraine — crossing a major escalation threshold
Biden makes unannounced visit to Kyiv on eve of one-year anniversary of invasion
ICC issues arrest warrant for Vladimir Putin over unlawful deportation of Ukrainian children
Finland officially joins NATO as 31st member, doubling the length of Russia's NATO border
Wagner Group captures Bakhmut after 10-month siege — bloodiest single battle of the war
Kakhovka dam destroyed — catastrophic flooding displaces 40,000 in southern Ukraine
Wagner Group armed mutiny — Prigozhin's columns advance on Moscow before sudden reversal deal
Russia withdraws from Black Sea Grain Initiative — global food supply fears surge
Military coup in Niger ousts President Bazoum — ECOWAS threatens military intervention
Wagner chief Prigozhin killed in plane crash two months after failed armed mutiny
Hamas launches surprise multi-front attack on Israel — 1,200 killed, 251 taken hostage into Gaza
Gaza hospital blast kills hundreds — disputed attribution inflames the Arab world
Israel launches ground invasion of northern Gaza Strip with armoured columns
Qatar-brokered Israel–Hamas ceasefire — 105 hostages released over four-day pause in fighting
US and UK strike Houthi targets in Yemen following 100+ attacks on Red Sea shipping lanes
Taiwan presidential election — William Lai wins, deepening cross-strait tensions with Beijing
Three US soldiers killed at Jordan's Tower 22 base — Iran-backed militia drone attack
Alexei Navalny dies in Arctic penal colony — Western nations formally accuse Kremlin of murder
Russian forces capture Avdiivka after months of brutal urban combat in eastern Ukraine
Israel strikes Iranian consulate in Damascus killing 13 including two senior IRGC generals
Iran launches first-ever direct strike on Israel — 300+ drones and ballistic missiles intercepted
Israel conducts retaliatory drone strike on Isfahan — first direct Israeli attack on Iranian soil
Israel launches Rafah ground offensive despite US warnings — 1.4 million civilians displaced
G7 approves $50 billion loan to Ukraine backed by frozen Russian sovereign assets
NATO Washington summit pledges 'irreversible path' for Ukraine membership and new air defence packages
Hamas political chief Ismail Haniyeh assassinated in Tehran — Israel widely blamed
Ukraine launches surprise cross-border offensive into Russia's Kursk Oblast — first incursion since WWII
Coordinated pager and walkie-talkie explosions kill and wound Hezbollah operatives across Lebanon
Iran fires 200 ballistic missiles at Israel — largest-ever direct Iranian attack on Israeli territory
Israel conducts major retaliatory airstrikes against Iranian air defence and missile production infrastructure
Donald Trump wins US Presidential election — signals sweeping shifts in Ukraine aid, NATO posture and trade
Biden authorises Ukraine to fire US long-range ATACMS missiles deep into Russian territory
Russia fires experimental Oreshnik hypersonic ballistic missile at Ukraine — first combat use globally
Assad regime collapses after rebel offensive — 54-year Assad dynasty ends in just 11 days
South Korean President Yoon impeached after short-lived martial law declaration triggers constitutional crisis
Trump inaugurated — halts foreign aid, signals Ukraine ceasefire push, orders sweeping tariff increases
Trump holds direct call with Putin — Ukraine excluded entirely from early ceasefire negotiations
US–Russia talks held in Riyadh — Kyiv and all European allies shut out of discussions on Ukrainian territory
Trump–Zelensky Oval Office confrontation collapses — US pauses all military and intelligence aid to Ukraine
Trump imposes 25% tariffs on Canada and Mexico and 20% on China — global trade war erupts across markets
